description: Style Note Crafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This kurti is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. It looks great when styled with leggings. Product Details White kurti, has colourful blue floral print, a mandarin collar with a split neckline, three quarter sleeves with a slit cuff and a vented hem Material and Care Cotton Hand wash in cold water Use mild detergent Dry in shade Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
